task_description: Rebuild The Thesis Forge with an advanced multi-stage humanization pipeline that defeats Turnitin AI detection by addressing token probability distributions, perplexity uniformity, n-gram predictability, and stylistic fingerprints through structural variation, controlled vocabulary injection, multi-pass LLM rewriting, perplexity variance injection, and NLP post-processing.

verification.summary: All module imports succeed. Pipeline instantiation and processing works correctly. All 5 stages (structural, lexical, LLM rewrite, perplexity, postprocess) function independently. Streamlit app starts successfully in headless mode with no errors. AI risk score computation works. Config values (API key, base URL) are correct.
